data.title: Protera achieves Microsoft Azure Expert MSP certification in cloud services, enhancing its technical expertise.
data.description: On July 17, 2025, in Chicago, it was reported that Protera, a technology company specializing in cloud transformations and managed services, has achieved the Microsoft Azure Expert Managed Service Provider (MSP) certification. This certification recognizes Protera's expertise in various technical areas.

data.title: XRP surges 32% weekly to $3.29 with market cap of $194.6 billion. Golden cross suggests potential for all-time highs.
data.description: XRP, a cryptocurrency, has caught the attention of investors once more due to positive technical signals and significant developments, raising the likelihood of a substantial surge. XRP is currently priced at $3.29 with a market capitalization of $194.6 billion, reflecting a 32% increase in the past week. In comparison, Bitcoin is priced at $119,138.85 with a market cap of $2.4 trillion, up by 4.7%, and Ethereum is at $3,426.40 with a market cap of $413.4 billion, marking a 20.9% rise. According to crypto chart analyst Ali Martinez, XRP's MVRV ratio has recently signaled a golden cross, a rare bullish indicator. The last time this occurred, XRP surged by an impressive 630%. This signals a potential upcoming surge in XRP value.

data.title: By 2025, Stellar (XLM) plans to achieve 5000 transactions per second (TPS) with upgrades for improved scalability on the Soroban platform.
data.description: The Stellar (XLM) Development Foundation aims to increase Stellar Core's transaction processing capacity to 5000 transactions per second (TPS) by 2025. This enhancement is intended to improve scalability and performance for the expanding Soroban platform.

data.title: Invesco and Bozzuto launch $1B program for East Coast multifamily assets, with first acquisition in Orlando's Baldwin Park.
data.description: A collaboration between Invesco Real Estate, a prominent global real estate investment platform managing $85 billion under Invesco Ltd., and Bozzuto recently completed its initial acquisition in Baldwin Park, Orlando. The joint venture unveiled a sizable $330 million multifamily real estate investment initiative.

data.title: MES Group team introduces 3 new soft starter products for air-conditioning, well pumps, and refrigeration in Florida and Texas.
data.description: MES Group executives have disclosed plans to visit Florida and Texas in late July for an extensive customer outreach effort, unveiling three new soft starter products for air conditioning, well pumps, and refrigeration. The initiative aims to engage with installers, contractors, farmers, and homeowners through in-person demonstrations, technical assistance, and product training. The U.S.-based company is set to collaborate closely with professionals during the trip to introduce their latest offerings to the market.
